accommodations.text: Permit brief movement breaks between tasks.
Allow text-to-speech for grade-level reading passages.
Pair new vocabulary with visuals and definitions.
accommodations.source_quote: pair new vocabulary with visuals and definitions

accommodations.text: Break multi-step directions into chunked, numbered steps.
accommodations.source_quote: break multi-step directions into numbered steps

accommodations.text: Provide visual supports and models for new tasks.
accommodations.source_quote: visual supports and models for new tasks

accommodations.text: Seat near the point of instruction and away from high-traffic areas.
accommodations.source_quote: preferential seating near the point of instruction

services.source_quote: Specialized academic instruction 50 minutes twice weekly

goals.text: Layla will define grade-level academic vocabulary with 80% accuracy.
goals.source_quote: define grade-level academic vocabulary with 80% accuracy

goals.text: Layla will independently report FM system problems to the teacher in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Reports FM system problems with prompting in 1 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: independently report FM system problems in 4 of 5 opportunities

goals.text: Sofia will retell a short narrative with a beginning, middle, and end in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Retells a narrative with only a beginning in 2 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: retell a short narrative with a beginning, middle, and end

goals.text: Grace will produce three organized sentences on a topic in 4 of 5 samples.
goals.baseline: Produces one sentence on a topic in 2 of 5 samples.
goals.source_quote: produce three organized sentences on a topic

goals.text: Ethan will complete and submit in-class assignments in 4 of 5 opportunities without redirection.
goals.baseline: Completes in-class assignments in 2 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: complete and submit in-class assignments in 4 of 5 opportunities
